Hardware Component File

OBC_AC3_350_v1.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference OBC_AC3_350_v1.0_20200624T102648.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DADEF1
Receive ID 18DAF1DE
Functional Addr DE
Functional Name BCB-OBC_29b

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "JABIL",
    "soft": "AC3",
    "version": "350"
  }
]
